props.ChoiceText: Rents, losses, thefts, and lies all came to hand as figures first, and by the time they became stories you already knew where blame would land.
props.ChoiceBio: Estate accounting taught you that numbers often confess earlier than men do.

0.TransitionText: Because estate accounting taught you that numbers often confess earlier than men do, household authority remained your daily craft.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Steward, but you may remain on your current path instead.
